extensionDescription.message: Tokišo ya professšene ya go ngwala ga Searabia go wepsaete ye nngwe le ye nngwe. E lokiša sekgoba magareng ga ditlhaka, e tšhela difonti tše botse tša Searabia, gomme e lokiša mathata a go romela ao a bakago mongwalo wa Searabia wo o kgaoganego.

masterToggleAriaLabel.message: Bula goba tima tlaleletšo ya Arabic Type

letterSpacingNote.message: Sekgoba sa ditlhaka se bewa go 0 ka mehla go thibela go kgaogana ga ditlhaka tša Searabia. Se ke sona lebaka le le tlwaelegago leo bakago go romela ga Searabia go senyega wepeng.

forceRTLLabel.message: Pedišo ya Go tšwa Kaja go ya Ka lehlakoreng la molema

forceRTLDescription.message: E fediša tsela ya go tšwa ka ja go ya ka lehlakoreng la molema go diboloko tša mongwalo wa Searabia. Bulela bakeng sa diwepsaete tšeo Searabia e hlagago ka phošo go tšwa ka lehlakoreng la molema go ya ka ja.

diacriticsLabel.message: Lokiša Sekgoba sa Ditiragatšo tša Medumo

diacriticsDescription.message: E kaonafatša go romela ga matšhwao a modumo wa Searabia (tashkeel) go thibela go sega ka godimo le ka tlase ga methaladi ya mongwalo.

siteFontOverrideLabel.message: Šomiša fonto e fapanego go wepsaete ye

siteFontOverrideDescription.message: Kgetha fonto e fapanego feela bakeng sa wepsaete ye, o fetša kgetho ya gago ya fonto ya lefase ka moka.

exceptionsEmpty.message: Ga go na diwepsaete tšeo di timilwego.

fontSourceNote.message: Difonti di newa ke Google Fonts. E nyaka kgokagano ya inthanete bakeng sa go laolla mathomong.

fontPrivacyNote.message: Dikgopelo tša fonto di romelwa go disentšhathi tša Google. Leba fonts.google.com/privacy.

statusArabicDetected.message: Mongwalo wa Searabia o lemogilwe — dikarolo tša $COUNT$ di lokišitšwe.

statusGlobalMode.message: Go šomišwa mokgwa wa lefase ka moka — matšhwao a lang/dir a hweditšwe.

statusNoArabic.message: Ga go na mongwalo wa Searabia wo o lemogilwego letlakaleng le.

statusContentScriptUnavailable.message: Ga e kgone go fihlelela letlakala le.

removeExceptionAriaLabel.message: Tloša $HOSTNAME$ go diwepsaete tšeo di timilwego
